---
title: "Function Reference"
---

## Preprocessing Functions

| Function | Description | Language |
|---|---|---|
| [`clean_data_by_batch`](preprocessing/clean-data-by-batch.qmd) | Process large CSV files in batches by subject ID with cleaning, filtering, and formatting | Python |
| [`summarize`](preprocessing/summarize.qmd) | Batch reading and frequency counting for large datasets | Python |
| [`summarize_unmapped`](preprocessing/summarize-unmapped.qmd) | Extract and summarize unmapped child entities with frequency counts | Python |
| [`get_code_counts_per_patient`](preprocessing/get-code-counts-per-patient.qmd) | Count parent code frequency per patient | Python |
| [`get_month`](preprocessing/get-month.qmd) | Convert days to months using floor/ceil logic | Python |
| [`get_monthly_counts`](preprocessing/get-monthly-counts.qmd) | Monthly event aggregation relative to diagnosis date | Python |

## Embedding Functions

| Function | Description | Language |
|---|---|---|
| [`BONMI`](embeddings/bonmi.qmd) | Main function for unified low-dimensional representation from PPMI matrices | R |
| [BONMI Package](embeddings/bonmi-package.qmd) | Overview of the BONMI algorithm with Procrustes alignment and embedding extraction | R |
| [`Procrustes`](embeddings/procrustes.qmd) | Orthogonal transformation for matrix alignment (minimizes Frobenius norm) | R |
| [`embedding`](embeddings/embedding.qmd) | Extract low-dimensional representation from SVD results | R |
| [`TextEncoder`](embeddings/text-encode.qmd) | HuggingFace transformer wrapper for PLM-based embeddings (CODER, SapBERT, BioBERT, PubMedBERT) | Python |
| [`get_AUC_MS`](embeddings/get-auc-ms.qmd) | AUC calculation for embedding similarity evaluation | R |
